neurons.description: CCI commodity channel index level at entry
neurons.logic: cci_oversold if cci < -100, cci_overbought if cci > 100, else cci_neutral
wr_oversold if williams_r < -80, wr_overbought if williams_r > -20, else wr_mid

neurons.description: Price position relative to daily pivot point at entry
neurons.logic: above_r1 / between_pivot_r1 / below_pivot based on pivot_position field

neurons.description: Money Flow Index level at entry
neurons.logic: mfi_oversold if mfi < 20, mfi_overbought if mfi > 80, else mfi_neutral

neurons.description: Rate of Change momentum at entry
neurons.logic: strong_roc if roc > 10, negative_roc if roc < 0, else moderate_roc
above_upper / below_lower / within_channel based on keltner_pos field

neurons.description: Donchian channel breakout state at entry
neurons.logic: new_high_breakout / new_low_breakout / mid_channel based on donchian_breakout field
strong_buying_pressure if cmf > 0.2, selling_pressure if cmf < -0.2, else neutral
dmi_bullish_cross / dmi_bearish_cross / no_cross based on dmi_cross field
above_cloud / below_cloud / in_cloud based on ichimoku_pos field
